residual_risks: extract_associated_files: lookback truncation (default 30 lines) not tested — files beyond last 30 lines silently dropped; disproportionate for normal hook use
extract_associated_files: top-level filePath camelCase in Read/Edit/Write not explicitly tested — covered via MultiEdit edits[].filePath in EA01
insert_memories: write throttle priority ordering not tested — existing coverage removed; disproportionate relative to hint scope
insert_memories: semantic dedup (find_nearest >= DEDUP_THRESHOLD) not tested — requires complex embedder mock; covered by IM01 which verifies insertion path
_trigger_background_backfill: subprocess.Popen calls not tested — external process; mocking would verify mock not behavior
